news.t: First Trust Expands Target Outcome® Lineup with Launch of DLAG, a Dual Directional 10% Buffer ETF Based on SPY

overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Dual Directional Buffer ETF - August (DLAG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to match the price return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust up to a cap or on its inverse value down to a specified threshold, over a one-year period. The strategy includes a 10% buffer once the downside threshold has been breached. DLAG was launched on Sep 19, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
